about.subtitle: Welcome to CEC Nepal
about.title: Pioneering Green Energy Solutions

potentialBox.heading: Nepal's Hydropower Potential
potentialBox.text: Theoretically, Nepal has a hydropower potential of over 83,000 MW, of which only about 42,000 MW could be considered technically and economically feasible.

about.intro: Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd. (CEC), established in 2006, is a leading national consultancy firm focusing on hydropower, solar, environment, and infrastructure projects across all project stages.

history.milestone: A sharp focus on delivering impactful, sustainable solutions for hydropower and water resource development.
